message: Thanks, Piotr. We received your inquiry on the 2024 Honda CR-V EX-L (VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001), confirmed your test drive for Sunday May 3 at 11:00 AM Pacific, and queued your 2020 Passat for an in-person appraisal at the same visit. A sales advisor will call +1 (415) 555-5678 within one business hour with the out-the-door number for ZIP 94107 and a preliminary trade-in estimate.
